creator: ports@logvinov.com
text:
Update to 1.2.6, this is a security update for CVE-2007-6077 :
    
    devel/rubygem-activesupport 1.4.2 to 1.4.4
    mail/rubygem-actionmailer 1.3.3 to 1.3.6
    databases/rubygem-activerecord 1.15.3 to 1.15.6
    www/rubygem-actionpack 1.13.3 to 1.13.6
    www/rubygem-actionwebservice 1.2.3 to 1.2.6
    www/rubygem-rails 1.2.3 to 1.2.6
    
    Patches:
  
    http://www.logvinov.ru/files/rails/1.2.6/activesupport.diff
    http://www.logvinov.ru/files/rails/1.2.6/activerecord.diff
    http://www.logvinov.ru/files/rails/1.2.6/actionpack.diff
    http://www.logvinov.ru/files/rails/1.2.6/actionwebservice.diff
    http://www.logvinov.ru/files/rails/1.2.6/actionmailer.diff
    http://www.logvinov.ru/files/rails/1.2.6/rails.diff
      
    All-in-one patch:
    
    http://www.logvinov.ru/files/rails/1.2.6/all.diff
